languages.text: "Говорите, мы во временной петле? Моим людям так и не удалось узнать ничего стоящего о подкреплении Гапраков. Но при таких преимуществах, как бесконечное время и право на ошибку, вы обязаны справиться. Узнайте, что сталось с союзной армией, — и я смогу назвать вас другом династии".
languages.translation_comment:
Не играет DL_LariaAskToFindGaprak
Стартует DL_LariaAskToFindGaprak и

traits.locale_text: "Говорите, мы во временной петле? Моим людям так и не удалось узнать ничего стоящего о подкреплении Гапраков. Но при таких преимуществах, как бесконечное время и право на ошибку, вы обязаны справиться. Узнайте, что сталось с союзной армией, — и я смогу назвать вас другом династии".

languages.translation_comment:
Не играет DL_LariaAskToFindGaprak
Стартует DL_LariaAskToFindGaprak и

languages.text: "You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."
languages.original_text: "Говорите, мы во временной петле? Моим людям так и не удалось узнать ничего стоящего о подкреплении Гапраков. Но при таких преимуществах, как бесконечное время и право на ошибку, вы обязаны справиться. Узнайте, что сталось с союзной армией, — и я смогу назвать вас другом династии".

traits.locale_text: "You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."

"You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."

"You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."

languages.text: “你是说我们困在时间循环里？关于贾帕克那支援军，我的人还没能查到什么实质性信息。但既然你拥有无限的时间和反复试错的优势，那你一定会成功。去查清楚我们的盟军究竟出了什么事，只有那样，我才会把你视为王朝的朋友。”
languages.original_text: "You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “你是说我们困在时间循环里？关于贾帕克那支援军，我的人还没能查到什么实质性信息。但既然你拥有无限的时间和反复试错的优势，那你一定会成功。去查清楚我们的盟军究竟出了什么事，只有那样，我才会把你视为王朝的朋友。”

languages.text: « Vous dites que nous sommes prisonniers d'une boucle temporelle ? Notre enquête sur la disparition des renforts Gaprak piétine, et mes gens ne sont toujours pas plus avancés. Mais puisque vous jouissez d'un délai et d'une marge d'erreur infinis, vous finirez forcément par y arriver. Découvrez ce qu'est devenue l'armée de nos alliés et alors, j'aurai la certitude de pouvoir vous compter parmi les amis de la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « Vous dites que nous sommes prisonniers d'une boucle temporelle ? Notre enquête sur la disparition des renforts Gaprak piétine, et mes gens ne sont toujours pas plus avancés. Mais puisque vous jouissez d'un délai et d'une marge d'erreur infinis, vous finirez forcément par y arriver. Découvrez ce qu'est devenue l'armée de nos alliés et alors, j'aurai la certitude de pouvoir vous compter parmi les amis de la dynastie. »

languages.text: "Zaman döngüsünde miyiz yani? Adamlarım, Gaprak takviyeleri hakkında henüz dişe dokunur bir şey öğrenemedi. Ancak sonsuz zamana ve hata lüksüne sahip olduğunuz için başarıya ulaşmanız işten bile değil. Müttefiklerimizin ordusuna ne olduğunu öğrenin, işte o zaman sizi hanedanlığın dostu olarak görebilirim."
languages.original_text: "You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Zaman döngüsünde miyiz yani? Adamlarım, Gaprak takviyeleri hakkında henüz dişe dokunur bir şey öğrenemedi. Ancak sonsuz zamana ve hata lüksüne sahip olduğunuz için başarıya ulaşmanız işten bile değil. Müttefiklerimizin ordusuna ne olduğunu öğrenin, işte o zaman sizi hanedanlığın dostu olarak görebilirim."

languages.text: «¿Dice que estamos en un bucle temporal? Mi gente aún no ha conseguido descubrir nada relevante sobre los refuerzos de los Gaprak, pero con las ventajas del tiempo infinito y la libertad de cometer errores, usted lo logrará. Descubra qué le ha ocurrido al ejército de nuestros aliados y podré considerarl{mf|e|a} amig{mf|o|a} de la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «¿Dice que estamos en un bucle temporal? Mi gente aún no ha conseguido descubrir nada relevante sobre los refuerzos de los Gaprak, pero con las ventajas del tiempo infinito y la libertad de cometer errores, usted lo logrará. Descubra qué le ha ocurrido al ejército de nuestros aliados y podré considerarl{mf|e|a} amig{mf|o|a} de la dinastía».

languages.text: "Ihr sagt, wir sind in einer Zeitschleife? Meine Leute haben noch nichts Substanzielles über die Gaprak-Verstärkung herausgefunden. Aber mit Vorteilen wie grenzenloser Zeit und Fehlertoleranz auf Eurer Seite werdet Ihr wohl Erfolg haben. Findet heraus, was mit der Armee unserer Verbündeten passiert ist, dann kann ich Euch {mf|einen Freund|eine Freundin} der Dynastie nennen."
languages.original_text: "You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr sagt, wir sind in einer Zeitschleife? Meine Leute haben noch nichts Substanzielles über die Gaprak-Verstärkung herausgefunden. Aber mit Vorteilen wie grenzenloser Zeit und Fehlertoleranz auf Eurer Seite werdet Ihr wohl Erfolg haben. Findet heraus, was mit der Armee unserer Verbündeten passiert ist, dann kann ich Euch {mf|einen Freund|eine Freundin} der Dynastie nennen."

languages.text: 「タイムループにいると？ 我が軍はガプラクの増援について、まだ実質的な情報を得ていない。だが、無限の時間と失敗の許容範囲がある君たちなら、必ず成功するだろう。我らの同盟軍の行方を知り、その上で君たちを王朝に友と呼ぶことができるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "You say we are in a time loop? My people have not yet managed to learn anything substantive about the Gaprak reinforcements. But with such advantages as infinite time and margin for error on your side, you are bound to succeed. Find out what happened to our allies' army, and then I will be able to call you a friend of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: 「タイムループにいると？ 我が軍はガプラクの増援について、まだ実質的な情報を得ていない。だが、無限の時間と失敗の許容範囲がある君たちなら、必ず成功するだろう。我らの同盟軍の行方を知り、その上で君たちを王朝に友と呼ぶことができるだろう。」
